curation_notes: Patch commit 627b547 modifies one source file (mini_racer_extension.cc) and adds one test file. The vulnerability is in convert_v8_to_binary which allocates a buffer based on arr->Length() but uses arr->Length() in the loop condition, allowing heap overflow if the array grows during iteration (e.g. via JavaScript getter side-effects). The fix caches the length before allocation and uses the cached value in the loop. Location derived directly from the patch diff. Language set to c++ since the vulnerable code is a C++ native extension. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per updated guidelines.
